油断するな！<br>モンスターはまだまだいるぞ！: Don't let your guard down! There are still plenty more monsters!
仲間と連携を取れ！<br>防御重視でいけ！: Coordinate with each other! Focus on defense!
ですが司令官！<br>攻撃に転じなければ、いずれはこちらの体力がつきます！:
But Commander! If we don't go on the offensive, we'll eventually run
out of stamina!
心配するな。<br>そろそろ、あいつが最適な場所に着くはずだ。: Don't worry. She should be in position by now.
ふいに――風切り音を響かせて飛来した一条の光が、<br>モンスターの頭部へと命中:
Suddenly, a streak of light tore through the air with a sharp whistle
and struck the monster square in the head.
飛来したのは魔力の光を帯びた１本の矢。<br>正確に急所を射貫かれたモンスターが:
The incoming arrow was imbued with magical light. The monster, shot
clean through a vital point, collapsed.
へぇ。あいつ、弓の腕はそれなりだと言っていたが、謙遜だったみたいだな。<br>か:
Heh. She said her archery was so-so, but that was an understatement.
She's really good.
引き続き守りを固めろ！<br>隙を見せたモンスターを、あいつが射貫いてくれる！:
Keep up the defense! She'll take out any monster that shows an
opening!
よし、このあたりのモンスターは一掃したな。<br>みんな、ご苦労だった！: Alright, looks like we've cleared this area. Good work, everyone!
はい、なんでしょうか。<br>司令官さま。: Yes, what is it, Lord Commander?
お前の弓の腕、見事だった。<br>あまり自信がないみたいだったが、十分すごいじゃ:
Your archery was impressive. You seemed to lack confidence, but it
was still amazing.
あら……ふふ♪ そんなに褒められると、照れてしまいますね。<br>私の弓は、自衛:
Oh... Fufu!♪ When you praise me like that, I get quite embarrassed.
My archery is merely practice for self-defense, you know.
ずいぶんと謙虚なんだな？<br>もっと自分を売り込めば、結構な金にもなるだろうに:
You're pretty modest. If you sold yourself more, you could make a
good bit of money.
いえいえ、滅相もないです。私はあくまで吟遊詩人。<br>人々に歌を聴いてもらうの:
No, no, not at all. I am simply a Bard. My real job is to share my songs
with people.♪
旅する吟遊詩人か。<br>結構、いろんな街を巡ってきたんだろ？:
So you're a traveling Bard. You've been around quite a few towns,
right?
はい♪ 小さな山村から、交易の要になっている大きな街まで、<br>色々なところを:
Yes!♪ From small mountain villages to large trading hubs, I've visited
all sorts of places.
小さな村ですと娯楽に乏しいので、<br>異国の英雄譚の弾き語りなどは、特に喜ばれ:
In small villages, entertainment is scarce, so recitals of heroic tales
from foreign lands are especially well-received.
小さな子どもなんて、特に目を輝かせて聴いてくれて、<br>とってもやりがいがある:
Children especially listen with sparkling eyes, and that makes it very
rewarding!♪
へぇ、それは興味あるな。<br>前線基地でも歌う予定はあるのか？:
Huh, that sounds interesting. Are you planning to sing at the
Frontline Base too?
はいっ。ご許可をいただければ、<br>広場などで歌わせていただきたいと思います♪:
Yes! If you would give me permission, I'd like to sing in the plaza or
somewhere!♪
もちろん、帰ったらすぐにでも許可を出そう。<br>人柄は俺が保証するよ。: Of course, I'll authorize it as soon as we return. I can vouch for you.
ふふっ、司令官さまのお墨付きをいただけるとは、<br>心強いですっ。:
Fufu, having the Lord Commander's endorsement... that's truly
encouraging.
ところで、魔力の扱いはどこで覚えたんだ？: By the way, where did you learn to use magic power?
私はペルディオンの出身なんです。<br>魔法の才能はなかったのですが、魔力を矢に:
I'm originally from Perdion. I had no talent for magic, but I can at
least infuse arrows with magic power.
なるほど。魔力の矢は、自分にできることを模索した結果か。:
I see. So Magic Arrow is the result of you figuring out what you're
capable of.
はい。<br>私程度の魔力でも、これなら戦力になれるかと思いまして♪:
Yes! I thought that even with my modest magic power, this way I could
contribute to the fight!♪
それどころか、さっきの戦いはあなたの援護あってこその勝利だ。<br>心強い仲間と:
Quite the opposite—that victory was only possible thanks to your
support. We've found a steadfast ally.
まったくだ。どうやったらあんなに精密に矢を放てるんだ？<br>戦場で冷静沈着を保:
Exactly. How do you manage to shoot so precisely? Do you have some
trick for staying calm on the battlefield?
まぁ、冷静沈着だなんて……ふふふ、ほめ過ぎです♪<br>私はただ、自分にできるこ:
'Calm and collected', you say? Fufufu, you flatter me. I'm merely
doing what I can, to the best of my ability.
マイペースなのは、冷静さの裏返しか。後衛にはもってこいの才能だ。<br>その様子:
Being easygoing is the flip side of calm, huh. Perfect for a rear
guard. You look like you can handle any situation.
（ん……？ ラモーナのやつ、なんか表情が暗いな。<br>どうかしたのか……？）: (Hm...? Ramona's looking a bit gloomy. Something wrong...?)
音の出所を探して周囲を見渡す……と、足元に小さな影がよぎる。<br>岩の陰にでも:
I searched for the sound source, then a small shadow crossed my
feet—a small snake, hidden under a rock, stuck out its tongue and hissed.
岩の隙間を住処にしているようですね。<br>毒のある種類ではないので、放っておい:
It seems to have made its nest in a crack in the rock. It's not a
poisonous species, so it should be fine to leave it alone.
そうだな。今はとにかく、先へ進んで――: Right. For now, let's just keep moving...
もしや、ラモーナさん……ヘビが苦手なんですか？: Could it be, Ramona... you're afraid of snakes?
ひぃぃぃぃぃぃぃ！<br>長いぃぃぃっ、細いぃぃぃっ、ヌメヌメしてるぅぅぅっ！: Eeeeek! So looooong, so thiiin, so sliiimy!
おっ、おぉ、お願いしますぅ……！<br>そのヘ、ヘビをどこかへ……どこかへどかし:
P-please... Please take that s-snake somewhere... somewhere far
away...!
ラモーナ、ヘビは遠くへ置いてきたぞ。: Ramona, I already moved the snake far away.
あ……ありがとうございますぅ……。<br>はぁぁ……怖かった……: Ah... thank you... *sigh*... that was terrifying...
まさか、そこまでヘビが苦手だとはな。: I never expected you'd be that afraid of snakes.
す、すみません、司令官さま。みっともないところをお見せして……。<br>私、ヘビ:
I-I'm sorry, Commander. To have you see me like this... I can't stand
snakes... just seeing them freezes me up.
はぁぁぁ……こんなことで怯えて腰を抜かしてしまうなんて、<br>情けないです……:
*sigh*... To be so scared by something like this that my legs give
out... it's pathetic... I'm nowhere near ready for the Abyss exploration at this rate...
まあ、ヘビは森でも山でも、いろんなところにいるからな。<br>そこまで苦手だと、:
Well, snakes are everywhere, in forests and mountains. If you're that
afraid of them, it might be a bit difficult.
そんなに苦手なのに、どうして探索の依頼を受けたんだ？<br>腕は確かだから、こっ:
If you're that afraid, why did you take the exploration request? Your
skills are solid, so I'm grateful, but...
それは……人の役に立ちたかったからです。: That's... because I wanted to be useful to others.
大穴やその周辺で、たくさんの人たちがモンスターの被害を<br>受けていると聞いて:
I heard that many people were suffering from monster attacks in and
around the Abyss, so I came to the Frontline Base.
私の歌でたくさんの人たちを元気にしたり、<br>心の傷を癒してあげられればと思っ:
I thought that I could cheer people up and heal their emotional
wounds with my songs...
街の人に歌を聴いてもらうのも、もちろん素敵なことです。:
Of course, it's also wonderful to have the townspeople listen to my
songs.
でも、一番心細い思いをするのは、<br>厳しい前線で戦っている人たちだと思ったん:
But I thought that the ones who felt the most anxious were the people
fighting on the harsh front lines.
ですので、まずは探索任務についていって信用してもらい、<br>それから大穴探索に:
So I thought I'd first join exploration missions to earn their trust, and
then I could accompany you on the Abyss exploration, but...
でも、結果はこのありさまで……。<br>こんな私では、大穴探索に連れていくことな:
But look at how it turned out... With me like this, there's no way you
can take me on the Abyss exploration...
ま、まあ、ヘビは追い払ったんだし、実際私たちも助かったので。<br>そう気を落と:
W-well, we chased the snake away, and you did help us out, so please
don't be so down.
とはいえ、モンスターとの戦闘中にさっきみたいになったら、<br>さすがに困るよな:
Still, if you freeze up like that during a monster battle, that'd be a
problem.
ちょ、ちょっと！<br>少しは気を遣いなさいよ！: H-hey! Could you be a little more considerate!
いえ……謝らないでください。<br>それが当然だと思いますから……: No... please don't apologize. I think that's only natural...
弱点の１つも克服できないまま、前線基地にいていいのか……。<br>少し、考えてみ:
Can I really stay at the Frontline Base without overcoming even one
of my weaknesses... I'll think about it.
……あまり気負い過ぎるなよ。: Don't be too hard on yourself.
このあたりの森に危険がないことは確認しているが、<br>植生についての調査は進ん:
I've confirmed there's no danger in the forest around here, but we
haven't made much progress on the vegetation survey.
役に立つ薬草が自生しているかもしれないし、<br>今のうちに環境調査を進めておか:
There might be some useful medicinal herbs growing wild around here,
so I'd better get the environmental survey done while I can.
ん……？ これは……竪琴の音色と、歌声？<br>いったい誰がこんな森の中で歌って:
Hm...? This is... a harp and a singing voice? Who could be singing in a
forest like this?
いや……待てよ。この声は、ひょっとして――: No... wait. This voice... could it be...?
ラモーナの周囲には、その綺麗な歌声につられてか、<br>鳥やリスなどの小さな動物:
Small animals—birds and squirrels—gathered around Ramona, drawn by
her beautiful singing voice.
小鳥がラモーナの肩に舞い降りる。<br>ラモーナの顔から笑みがこぼれ、小鳥に話し:
A small bird alighted on Ramona's shoulder. A smile spread across her
face, and she spoke to the bird.
ふふっ、こんにちは。あなたも一緒に歌ってくれるの？<br>それじゃあ、一緒に歌い: Fufu, hello! Will you sing with me too? Then let's sing together!♪
（戦う時の鋭い表情とは、全然ちがう顔をするんだな。<br>いや……むしろこれが、:
(Her face is completely different from the sharp expression she
wears in battle. No... perhaps this is Ramona's true face.)
（……いい歌声だな。<br>ずっと聴いていたくなる）: (...What a beautiful voice. I could listen to it forever.)
